creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
This happened because sbcl was updated in the ports tree without bumping PORTREVISION for maxima.

I will not submit a patch to fix this because I am about to update maxima to 5.43.1, which will solve your issue too. I will submit the update today or tomorrow and link the PR to this PR for your convenience.

If, for some reason, you can not wait for the coming update, just rebuild maxima from ports on your system: it should be enough.
